name: OnKure Therapeutics, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview OnKure Therapeutics, Inc. (OnKure, we, us or the Company) is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on the discovery and development of precision medicines that target biologically validated drivers of cancers and other diseases that are underserved by available therapies.
